meta.title: HSE Utilities & Power — Arc-Flash Assessment
meta.subtitle: Main switchboard MSB-1, arc-flash boundary study
meta.author: HSE Utilities & Power
meta.deid_notice: All personnel are referred to by role label. Identifiers were pseudonymised before drafting; the re-identification key is held separately and is not part of this document.

sections.text: This study computes the incident energy and arc-flash boundary at main switchboard MSB-1 using the IEEE 1584-2018 method (the SUB-02 engine). The worked example below is the AF-1 calibration case. Coefficients are PROVISIONAL pending verification against a licensed IEEE 1584-2018 copy.

sections.caption: IEEE 1584-2018 arc-flash inputs and computed arcing current

sections.text: Incident energy below 1.2 cal/cm² maps to NFPA 70E PPE category 0; coefficients are provisional pending licensed-copy verification.

rows.title: Boundary intrudes on adjacent walkway
rows.description: The 490 mm arc-flash boundary extends into the maintenance walkway at MSB-1.

rows.title: Labelling out of date
rows.description: The arc-flash warning label predates this study.

rows.control: Reduce clearing time via maintenance-mode trip setting
Re-mark the arc-flash boundary on the floor and panel label
Energised-work permit for any live activity within the boundary

rows.action: Update arc-flash labels with the computed boundary and category
Verify the IEEE 1584-2018 coefficients against a licensed copy

sections.text: No live work inside the 490 mm boundary without an energised-work permit and verified arc-rated PPE.

items: NFPA 70E — electrical safety in the workplace
